name: list_saved_keywords
description: Lists keywords saved to a project (with cached metrics like search volume, difficulty, CPC, and tags if available). Free — reads from OpenSEO's database, no DataForSEO call. Use tag filters when the user asks for a saved segment; multiple tags match ANY tag.

projectId.description: Required. The OpenSEO project ID to scope this call to. Get one from list_projects.

tags.description: Optional tag-name filters. Multiple tags match ANY tag.

limit.description: Maximum rows to return. Defaults to 100.
